ItacPersonItem.Notes: Nationality stated `Milanese` in Francesco Saverio Quadrio, Della storia e della ragione d’ ogni poesia (4 vols., [vol. 1] Bologna: S. Antonio, 1739; [vols. 2-4] Milan: F. Agnelli, 1742-49), vol. 2, 318.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
